description: Golf preview skill calculated the target weekend as May 20-22 (Wed/Thu/Fri) instead of May 22-24 (Fri/Sat/Sun). All three days were analyzed incorrectly. The error propagated to preview-output.json and the Slack notification to #golf, which reported no viable windows when in fact Saturday May 23 is fully clear.
correction: Target weekend is May 22 (Fri), May 23 (Sat), May 24 (Sun). Saturday May 23 has no conflicts. Top option is Saturday 4:00 PM at $15/player.
systemic_fix: Updated SKILL.md Step 1 to use currentDate from system context as primary source rather than Desktop Commander osascript. Added cross-validation step and day-of-week offset table covering all run days, not just Tuesday. Desktop Commander is now fallback only.
